recommendations.title: The Trip to Spain
recommendations.overview: Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon embark on a road trip along the coast of Spain.

recommendations.title: The Face of an Angel
recommendations.overview: Both a journalist and a documentary filmmaker chase the story of a murder and its prime suspect.

recommendations.title: Greed
recommendations.overview: A retail billionaire's 60th birthday party is celebrated in an exclusive hotel on the Greek island of Mykonos.

recommendations.title: The Trip to Italy
recommendations.overview: Years after their successful restaurant review tour of Northern England, Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon are commissioned for a new tour in Italy.

recommendations.title: The Trip
recommendations.overview: When Steve Coogan is asked by The Observer to tour the country's finest restaurants, he envisions it as the perfect getaway with his beautiful girlfriend. But, when she backs out on him, he has no one to accompany him but his best friend and source o

recommendations.title: The Road to Guantanamo
recommendations.overview: Part drama, part documentary, The Road to Guantánamo focuses on the Tipton Three, a trio of British Muslims who were held in Guantanamo Bay for two years until they were released without charge.

recommendations.title: A Mighty Heart
recommendations.overview: Based on Mariane Pearl's account of the terrifying and unforgettable story of her husband, Wall Street Journal reporter Danny Pearl's life and death.

recommendations.title: Genova
recommendations.overview: A man moves his two daughters to Italy after their mother dies in a car accident, in order to revitalize their lives. Genoa changes all three of them as the youngest daughter starts to see the ghost of her mother, while the older one discovers her se

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: The Look of Love
recommendations.overview: Paul Raymond builds a porn, entertainment and real estate empire that makes him the wealthiest man in Britain, but drugs doom his beloved daughter, Debbie.
